training.title: Nike Metcon 9
training.description: Built for the toughest training sessions, the Metcon 9 delivers a stable, flat heel for lifting and a flexible forefoot for dynamic movement. Features React foam cushioning and a wide, flat heel clip for stability during heavy lifts.

training.title: Adidas Powerlift 5
training.description: Engineered for powerlifting, the Powerlift 5 offers a raised heel for better squat depth, a wide toe box, and a stable base to support heavy loads. Canvas upper keeps it lightweight.

training.title: Reebok Nano X3
training.description: The Nano X3 is the ultimate cross-training shoe with Floatride Energy Foam for cushioning and a FlexWeave upper that adapts to your foot's movement through every exercise.

training.title: UA TriBase Reign 5
training.description: Zero drop from heel to toe means a more natural training position. The TriBase outsole maximises ground contact and grip, making it ideal for dynamic movements and heavy compound lifts.

running.title: Nike Pegasus 41
running.description: The go-to daily trainer trusted by millions. React foam and a full-length Air unit deliver a smooth, energised ride across any distance. Updated engineered mesh upper keeps feet cool.

running.title: Adidas Ultraboost 23
running.description: Premium Boost midsole returns energy with every step. An adaptive Primeknit+ upper wraps your foot like a second skin. Designed for long runs where comfort is non-negotiable.

running.title: ASICS Gel-Kayano 30
running.description: A stability running shoe with GEL cushioning technology in the heel and forefoot. FF BLAST+ ECO midsole and a structured heel counter help control mild to moderate overpronation.

running.title: New Balance Fresh Foam X 1080v13
running.description: Maximum cushioning for long-distance comfort. Fresh Foam X midsole with a hyper-soft feel and a Hypoknit upper that stretches where you need it and supports where you don't.

running.title: Brooks Ghost 16
running.description: Balanced cushioning and smooth transitions make the Ghost 16 a reliable everyday runner. DNA Loft v2 cushioning adapts to your stride whether you're a heel striker or midfoot runner.

multisport.title: Nike Wildhorse 8
multisport.description: Rugged trail shoe adapted for multisport athletes. React foam cushioning paired with aggressive lugs handles mud, gravel, and hard-pack terrain with equal ease.

multisport.title: Salomon Speedcross 6
multisport.description: Iconic crossover outsole with deep, chevron-shaped lugs for exceptional grip in mud and loose terrain. Lightweight yet protective for trail running and adventure racing.

multisport.title: Adidas Terrex Speed Ultra
multisport.description: Race-ready trail shoe with Continental rubber outsole for wet and dry grip. Ultra-light at 220g and low-profile, built for technical terrain and obstacle course racing.

multisport.title: Inov-8 Mudclaw G 260
multisport.description: Graphene-grip outsole with 8mm spike-like lugs dominates the muddiest conditions. Ideal for OCR events, fell running, and cyclocross transitions.

multisport.title: Hoka Speedgoat 5
multisport.description: Maximum cushioning on the trail. VibramÂ® Megagrip outsole with 5mm lugs grips rocks and roots. Wide toe box allows natural splay during descents.

casual.title: Nike Air Force 1 '07
casual.description: The legendary AF1 reimagined for today. Leather upper, foam midsole with visible Air unit, and a pivot circle on the rubber outsole. An icon that goes with everything.

casual.title: Adidas Stan Smith
casual.description: The original clean court shoe. Smooth leather upper, iconic perforated trefoil branding, and a timeless silhouette that defines minimalist style.

casual.title: Vans Old Skool
casual.description: The first shoe to feature Vans' iconic sidestripe. Canvas and suede upper, original waffle sole. The quintessential skate-turned-street shoe.

casual.title: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star Hi
casual.description: Almost unchanged since 1917. Canvas upper, ankle patch, rubber toecap, and the iconic All Star ankle patch. A cultural staple worn by musicians, artists, and everyone else.

casual.title: PUMA Suede Classic XXI
casual.description: Originally introduced in 1968 and still going strong. Suede leather upper with PUMA Formstrip branding and a vulcanised rubber sole. Timeless street style.

sneakers.title: Nike Air Max 90
sneakers.description: The Air Max 90 is comfort and style wrapped in classic running DNA. Visible Max Air unit in the heel, leather and synthetic upper, and that unmistakable waffle outsole.

sneakers.title: Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG
sneakers.description: The sneaker that started a revolution. Classic leather upper, encapsulated Air cushioning, and the iconic Wings logo. Every colourway tells a new story.

sneakers.title: Adidas Yeezy Boost 350 V2
sneakers.description: Primeknit upper, Boost midsole technology, and that iconic side stripe. One of the most sought-after sneaker silhouettes of the generation, blending performance foam with hype-driven design.

sneakers.title: New Balance 550
sneakers.description: A retro basketball shoe making a serious comeback. Leather upper with heel panel, EVA foam sole, and an understated colour-blocked design. Effortlessly cool.

training.title: Nike Metcon 9 Women's
training.description: The women's Metcon 9 is engineered for the toughest workouts. React foam cushioning paired with a wide flat heel clip for stability during lifting sessions and quick transitions.

training.title: Adidas Dropset 2 Trainer Women's
training.description: Dual-density midsole with a wide base for stable lifting and flexible forefoot for agility work. A breathable mesh upper keeps you comfortable through the toughest circuit sessions.

training.title: Reebok Nano X3 Women's
training.description: Floatride Energy foam and FlexWeave upper built for women's biomechanics. Versatile enough for rope climbs, box jumps, and heavy deadlifts in the same session.

training.title: UA HOVR Rise 4 Women's
training.description: HOVR foam provides near-zero gravity feel while helping maintain energy return. Ideal for HIIT and group fitness classes where you need cushioning and court-style grip.

training.title: PUMA Fuse 2.0 Women's
training.description: Low-profile training shoe with a stable base and breathable knit upper. Multi-directional flex grooves allow natural movement through any exercise from squats to agility drills.

running.title: Nike Pegasus 41 Women's
running.description: The trusted women's daily trainer with React foam and Air cushioning. Engineered mesh with wider toe box accommodates natural foot shape during long miles.

running.title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 26 Women's
running.description: Maximum cushioning for long-distance runners. PureGEL technology in the rearfoot delivers ultra-softness on impact. FF BLAST+ midsole provides a high-energy return feel.

running.title: Hoka Bondi 8 Women's
running.description: Hoka's most cushioned road shoe. A full-compression EVA midsole and extended heel geometry reduce impact on every step. The softness is unmatched in road running.

running.title: New Balance Fresh Foam X 880v14 Women's
running.description: A balanced daily trainer with a versatile Fresh Foam X midsole that works for both short recovery jogs and longer tempo efforts. Hypoknit upper offers targeted stretch zones.

running.title: Brooks Adrenaline GTS 23 Women's
running.description: The bestselling women's stability running shoe. Guide RailsÂ® hold your hips and knees aligned naturally. DNA LOFT v2 cushioning adapts to your stride for easy miles.

multisport.title: Hoka Speedgoat 5 Women's
multisport.description: Maximum trail cushioning for women. Vibram Megagrip with 5mm lugs provides tenacious grip on slick rocks and roots. Wide toe box allows natural foot splay on technical descents.

multisport.title: Adidas Terrex Trailrider Women's
multisport.description: Lightweight and agile trail running shoe with LightMotion EVA midsole and Continental rubber outsole. Made with recycled materials as part of Adidas' commitment to sustainability.

multisport.title: Brooks Caldera 7 Women's
multisport.description: Maximum cushioning for long days on the trail. BioMoGo DNA midsole with TrailTack rubber outsole featuring 5mm multi-directional lugs for confident grip on all surfaces.

multisport.title: Merrell Moab Speed 2 Women's
multisport.description: Versatile multisport shoe that crosses from trail to casual use. Float Pro foam midsole and a Merrell M-Select Grip outsole with 3.5mm lugs for multi-terrain confidence.

casual.title: Nike Air Force 1 '07 Women's
casual.description: The iconic AF1 in classic women's colourways. Leather upper, foam midsole with full-length Air unit, and a pivot circle outsole. As bold or as clean as you want it.

casual.title: Adidas Samba OG Women's
casual.description: The Samba is everywhere right now and for good reason. Supple leather upper, gum sole, and a low-profile silhouette that works with everything from tailored trousers to mini skirts.

casual.title: Vans Authentic Women's
casual.description: The simplest, most versatile shoe Vans makes. Low-top canvas upper, original waffle outsole, and a clean silhouette that's defined effortless cool since 1966.

casual.title: Converse Chuck 70 Hi Women's
casual.description: An elevated take on the classic Chuck Taylor. Higher-grade canvas, more cushioning, and premium details make the Chuck 70 the grown-up version of an icon.

casual.title: New Balance 327 Women's
casual.description: 70s-inspired running heritage meets modern street styling. An oversized N logo, suede and mesh panelling, and a thick waffle sole make the 327 a statement casual shoe.

sneakers.title: Nike Air Max 97 Women's
sneakers.description: Inspired by Japanese bullet trains, the Air Max 97 has full-length visible Air cushioning and a sleek, streamlined silhouette. A cultural icon that belongs in every rotation.

sneakers.title: New Balance 530 Women's
sneakers.description: A 90s running archive gem now dominating street style. Suede and mesh panels, the REVlite midsole, and that distinctive 530 silhouette make it a go-to chunky sneaker.

sneakers.title: ASICS Gel-NYC Women's
sneakers.description: Blending the Gel-MC Plus v3 and Gel-Nimbus 3 into one premium lifestyle shoe. GEL technology cushioning and premium suede panels make the Gel-NYC a favourite for sneaker collectors.

sneakers.title: Nike Cortez Women's
sneakers.description: Nike's very first shoe, redesigned for contemporary fashion. The Cortez is a cultural artifact â€” worn by athletes, artists, and icons â€” with a leather upper and the classic Swoosh.
